local_work_summary: BUG-FUNC-001 tracks the current OxFml handoff for array-involved binary arithmetic through the OxFunc operator surface and the related closure-surface correction work.
BUG-FUNC-002 tracks the broader ordinary-operator broadcast rule proven by local Excel comparison and the downstream handoff needed to remove OxFml fallback behavior honestly.
BUG-FUNC-003 tracks the first-class same-sheet MultiArea seam correction across OP_UNION_REF, AREAS, INDEX, and related reference-sensitive transport surfaces.
HANDOFF-OXFUNC-002 tracks the follow-on seam narrowing that moves same-sheet MultiArea value materialization into OxFunc-owned resolver-driven combination semantics.

BUG-FUNC-004 tracks the current corpus follow-on: IF/IFS empty-text condition is pinned as no local bug, while operators plus criteria/database/SWITCH reopen around Excel near-equality numeric comparison tolerance.
BUG-FUNC-005 tracks the shared power-kernel parity bug where POWER(0,0) and OP_POWER 0^0 must surface #NUM! rather than 1.

BUG-FUNC-006 tracks the reopened lookup-family lane where live Excel spills array-valued lookup needles for XMATCH, MATCH, VLOOKUP, and HLOOKUP, while adjacent XLOOKUP risk remains an explicit follow-on.
BUG-FUNC-007 and W080 track the immediate text-slice spill correction plus the bounded review seed for broader function-array-support investigation across the supported surface.
BUG-FUNC-008 tracks the first bounded W080 follow-on batch where live Excel spills array-valued inputs through CHAR, CODE, LOWER, UPPER, TRIM, REPT, TEXTAFTER, and TEXTBEFORE.

BUG-FUNC-009 tracks the reopened RATE lane where Excel returns a small positive periodic rate for a mortgage-style omitted-guess row but the local default-guess solver path currently fails with #NUM!.
